## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm verify` is green (typecheck + lint + tests)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (test-first where practical)
- [ ] Any new env var added to `.env.example` + `lib/env.ts` (+ `ALLOWED_PROD_KEYS` if the worker needs it)
- [ ] Any Prisma schema change includes a migration
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or setup changed
